The following events took place in approximately '''24,000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Tionese War]] begins.

==Battles==
*[[Battle of Coruscant (Tionese War)|Battle of Coruscant]]

==Behind the scenes==
In the fourth entry in the ''[[Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut]]'' series of blog posts, the end date for the Tionese War is erroneously identified as 24,000 BBY instead of [[23,900 BBY]].<ref name="Blog">{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-4-the-rise-of-the-republic-needs-author-entry|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 4: The Rise of the Republic}}</ref>
